exposure_text: Did you know that our local hospitals are struggling to keep up with the influx of immigrants? My neighbor works as a nurse and says they're constantly understaffed because resources are stretched thin. We need to have a serious conversation about sustainable immigration levels before our healthcare system collapses. #CommunityFirst #HealthcareCrisis

A neutral civic-information post summarizes balanced arguments about Immigration and Citizenship. It explains policy background for Immigration Level Decrease Support without persuasive or manipulative framing.
Just saw a report that refugee resettlement programs are costing taxpayers millions with no real benefits. Why are we prioritizing strangers over our own citizens? #RefugeeRealities
